title: How long had the police taken to find his bicycle?

meanings.usage: 指对某事感到忧虑或不安的状态
指被动地获得或收到某物
形容与某地相关的事物
文中指警察局，a police station
指对意外之事感到惊奇
指通过某种方式传递某物
与not连用表示不再做某事
指新发生的信息或事件

phrases.usage: 表示短暂拜访或停留某地

examples.en: Dan was asked to call at the station.
examples.zh: 丹被要求去警察局一趟。

examples.en: The train calls at every station.
examples.zh: 火车每站都停。

phrases.usage: 表示偶然发现、捡起或接人

examples.en: The bicycle was picked up in a small village.
examples.zh: 自行车是在一个小村庄被发现的。

examples.en: I'll pick you up at the airport.
examples.zh: 我会去机场接你。

examples.en: Dan Robinson has been worried all week.
examples.zh: 丹·鲁滨逊整个星期都很担心。

examples.en: She was worried about her exam.
examples.zh: 她担心她的考试。

examples.en: Dan was most surprised when he heard the news.
examples.zh: 丹听到这个消息时非常惊讶。

examples.en: We were surprised at the result.
examples.zh: 我们对结果感到惊讶。

examples.en: He was amused too, because he never expected the bicycle to be found.
examples.zh: 他也觉得好笑，因为他从未期望自行车能被找到。

examples.en: It is now being sent to his home by train.
examples.zh: 现在正通过火车寄送给他。

examples.en: We often travel by train.
examples.zh: 我们经常坐火车旅行。

examples.en: He has been worried all week.
examples.zh: 他整个星期都很担心。

examples.en: He went to the station yesterday and now he is not worried anymore.
examples.zh: 他昨天去了警察局，现在不再担心了。

examples.en: Dan wondered why he was wanted by the police.
examples.zh: 丹想知道为什么警察要找他。

examples.en: He never expected the bicycle to be found.
examples.zh: 他从未期望自行车能被找到。

examples.en: I never expected to see you here.
examples.zh: 我从未想到会在这里见到你。

grammar.title: 过去完成时 (Past Perfect Tense)
grammar.definition: 表示在过去某一时刻之前已经完成的动作，强调“过去的过去”。
grammar.structure: 主语 + had + 过去分词
grammar.usage: 用于描述两个过去的动作，先发生的动作用过去完成时，后发生的动作用一般过去时。常用时间状语：already, just, never, ever, before, after, when等。

examples.en: Dan had been worried all week before he went to the station.
examples.zh: 在去警察局之前，丹已经担心了一整周。

examples.en: The bicycle had been stolen twenty years ago.
examples.zh: 自行车在二十年前就被偷了。

examples.en: He was not worried anymore because the bicycle had been found.
examples.zh: 他不再担心了，因为自行车已经被找到了。

grammar.title: 过去进行时 (Past Continuous Tense)
grammar.definition: 表示在过去某一时刻或时间段正在进行的动作。
grammar.usage: 用于描述过去正在发生的动作，常与when, while, at that time等连用。

examples.en: He was smiling when he told Dan the news.
examples.zh: 他告诉丹这个消息时正微笑着。

examples.en: The police were working on the case for five days.
examples.zh: 警察处理这个案件已经五天了。

grammar.title: 一般过去时 (Past Simple Tense)
grammar.definition: 表示过去发生的动作或存在的状态。
grammar.usage: 用于描述过去某个具体时间发生的动作，常与yesterday, last week, two years ago等时间状语连用。

examples.en: He received a letter from the local police.
examples.zh: 他收到了当地警察的一封信。

examples.en: Dan went to the station yesterday.
examples.zh: 丹昨天去了警察局。

sentencePatterns.pattern: How long had + 主语 + 过去分词...?

original.en: How long had the police taken to find his bicycle?
original.zh: 警察花了多长时间才找到他的自行车？

imitations.en: How long had she been waiting for the bus?
How long had he studied English before he moved to London?
imitations.zh: 他在搬到伦敦之前学了多久英语？

sentencePatterns.pattern: 主语 + has been + 形容词/动词-ing + all + 时间段

original.en: Dan Robinson has been worried all week.
original.zh: 丹·鲁滨逊整个星期都很担心。

imitations.en: She has been happy all day.
They have been working hard all month.
imitations.zh: 他们整个月都在努力工作。

original.en: At the station, he was told by a smiling policeman that his bicycle had been found.
original.zh: 在警察局，一位微笑着的警察告诉他自行车已经被找到了。

imitations.en: I was told that the meeting had been cancelled.
imitations.zh: 我被告知会议已经被取消了。

imitations.en: She was told that her son had passed the exam.
imitations.zh: 她被告知她儿子已经通过了考试。

sentencePatterns.pattern: 主语 + never expected + (that) + 从句

original.en: He never expected the bicycle to be found.
original.zh: 他从未期望自行车能被找到。

imitations.en: I never expected to pass the exam.
imitations.zh: 我从未期望能通过考试。

imitations.en: She never expected that he would come back.
